AGENTS.md.inaccuracy: Claims ~120 lines but actual is 130 lines
AGENTS.md.accuracy: Good - comprehensive navigation index linking to all docs
issues: Line count 130 exceeds target 80-120 by 10 lines
Self-document says '约 120 行' but is inaccurate

docs_ARCHITECTURE.accuracy: Good - mermaid diagrams, layer table, dependency graph, data flow
issues: Does not reference LAYER_MAP.md for detailed rules
API reference link points to non-existent docs/references/api.md

docs_LAYER_MAP.accuracy: Excellent - detailed dependency matrices for both Go and Vue3
issues: Large file (225 lines) - could be split into Go and Vue3 sections
Vue3 section mentions composables but project uses Pinia stores (inconsistency)
STUDENT_MANAGEMENT.md seems newly added (May 8) - may not be integrated into navigation
Missing: FEE_MANAGEMENT.md (mentioned in ARCHITECTURE but not in design-docs)
Missing: INSPECTION_SYSTEM.md (mentioned in ARCHITECTURE but not in design-docs)
Only covers Go backend layers - no frontend layer checking
No mention of how to run frontend layer check (users must know to use lint-deps.mjs separately)
Error output could be more structured (JSON format for programmatic parsing)

layer_map_coverage.stores_actual: Pinia stores used instead of composables

issues: Two implementations exist (.mjs and .ts) - duplication risk and potential drift
lint-deps.ts uses different rule structure than lint-deps.mjs
lint-deps.ts comments say 'composables' but LAYER_MAP.md and actual project use 'stores'
lint-deps.mjs correctly maps to Pinia stores - lint-deps.ts is outdated
Not integrated into Makefile 'verify-fe' target (only lint-fe and type-check-fe)
Makefile lint-deps-fe uses .mjs but lint-deps.ts is also present causing confusion

task_boilerplate.quality: Excellent - detailed steps, verification commands, constraints

issues: No verification of frontend layer compliance in task templates
No task for emergency hotfix workflow
No task for database migration only
Task state structure not documented
Trace contains SKIP report, not actual execution trace
No documented trace format specification
No memory structure documentation
verification-report-room.json shows 'skip' due to Docker lacking Go toolchain - this is a significant limitation
No trace replay or verification automation
Schema has internal inconsistencies (services array referenced but not properly closed)
Missing: actual services[] array definition in JSON (only _meta.todos exists)
Frontend dev port mismatch: environment.json says 3000, but harness/scripts/start-fe.sh likely uses Vite default 5173
No validation schema for environment.json
start-fe.sh and start-frontend.sh both exist - potential confusion
start-server.sh and start-be.sh both exist - potential confusion
No health check verification after starting services
No error handling for partial startup failures
lint-deps-fe (frontend layer check) is separate from verify-fe, not part of main flow
No single command for full layer check (both backend + frontend)
Missing: lint-quality-fe target (only exists for backend)

gaps.title: Duplicate frontend layer linters causing drift
gaps.description: Both lint-deps.mjs (177 lines) and lint-deps.ts (120 lines) exist with different implementations. lint-deps.ts references composables but project uses Pinia stores. This causes confusion and maintenance burden.
gaps.recommendation: Remove lint-deps.ts, keep only lint-deps.mjs. Update Makefile to explicitly use node scripts/lint-deps.mjs

gaps.title: AGENTS.md line count claim inaccurate
gaps.description: AGENTS.md header says '约 120 行' but actual line count is 130. This is a documentation inaccuracy.
gaps.recommendation: Update the footer note to say '约 130 行' or reduce content to fit 120 lines

gaps.title: Trace format is skip report, not actual execution trace
gaps.description: harness/trace/verification-report-room.json contains a skip message indicating Docker container lacks Go toolchain. This means the trace system cannot verify code execution inside its own environment.
gaps.recommendation: Either: 1) Ensure Docker image includes Go toolchain, or 2) Document that verification must run on host machine

gaps.title: Missing design docs for documented features
gaps.description: ARCHITECTURE.md mentions '费用管理' (FEE_MANAGEMENT) and '巡查记录' (INSPECTION_SYSTEM) but no corresponding design-docs exist.
gaps.recommendation: Either create FEE_MANAGEMENT.md and INSPECTION_SYSTEM.md, or update ARCHITECTURE.md to remove these items

gaps.title: environment.json has structural issues
gaps.description: Schema version 2.0 shows 'services' array referenced but the actual services[] definition appears incomplete or malformed. Also port mismatch: environment.json says 3000 for frontend but Vite uses 5173.
gaps.recommendation: Fix JSON structure and verify frontend port configuration matches actual Vite config

gaps.title: Frontend layer check not integrated in main verify-fe flow
gaps.description: lint-deps-fe (frontend layer check) exists as separate target but not called by verify-fe. User must run lint-deps-fe manually or separately.
gaps.recommendation: Add lint-deps-fe to verify-fe prerequisites: 'verify-fe: type-check-fe lint-fe lint-deps-fe build-fe'

gaps.title: No programmatic trace output format
gaps.description: lint-deps.go outputs human-readable text but no JSON format for CI/CD integration or trace systems.
gaps.recommendation: Add --json flag to output machine-parseable format for harness integration

gaps.title: No trace format specification documentation
gaps.description: No documented spec for trace format, memory structure, or checkpoint format.
gaps.recommendation: Create docs/harness/TRACE_FORMAT.md documenting JSON schema for traces, checkpoints, and memory

gaps.title: lint-deps.mjs Vue3 layer mapping may be incorrect
gaps.description: lint-deps.mjs uses Layer 0-4 for Vue3 (types, api, stores, views, components) but LAYER_MAP.md also uses 0-4 for different directories. The mapping looks correct but not validated against actual project.
gaps.recommendation: Verify lint-deps.mjs correctly handles @/ alias imports and self-references

gaps.title: No task templates for common scenarios
gaps.description: Missing templates for: emergency hotfix, database migration only, frontend-only changes, security patch.

gaps.title: Duplicate startup scripts causing confusion
gaps.description: Both start-be.sh and start-server.sh exist; both start-fe.sh and start-frontend.sh exist.
gaps.recommendation: Remove duplicates and keep consistent naming (start-be.sh, start-fe.sh)

actions: Document that harness verification requires host machine with Go toolchain, not Docker container
Create missing design docs (FEE_MANAGEMENT, INSPECTION_SYSTEM) or remove from ARCHITECTURE.md
Fix environment.json structural issues and port mismatch
Add lint-deps-fe to verify-fe in Makefile
Add missing task templates for edge cases
